programs.title: The Sweeney
programs.desc: Tough '70s police series. Regan gets involved in gangland warfare following the death of one of London's leading villains.

programs.title: Minder
programs.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a loveable rogue. Arthur receives a couple of interesting propositions while attending Charlie Johnson's funeral.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: US documentary series. Mike and Frank go head to head when they search a jam-packed barn and 26 underground rooms for objects with the loser having to clean the van.

programs.title: Junk and Disorderly
programs.desc: Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are in Stafford with a stall full of bikes and trinkets they've picked up in Hereford and Whitstable to see how much they can make.

programs.title: Rocky Balboa
programs.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Antonio Darver, 2006. 30 years after his first fight, Rocky Balboa comes out of retirement and prepares for one last fight.
